calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2024 Vacated

Notice And Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. NANCY SOTOMAYOR, Esq. of Akerman LLP (tel: 213-688-9500) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF RENEE HUDSON Notice And Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

"Plaintiff's unopposed motion for dismissal of representative action without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
